name: Chicken Breast with Lemon and Capers
recipeIngredient: 2 skinned and boned chicken breasts (about 1 pound), halved and pounded to 1/4-inch thickness
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, black pepper, and paprika on a plate.
2. Press each chicken breast into the mixture, coating it evenly all over, and shake off any excess.
3. In a heavy 10-inch skillet, heat the corn oil over moderately high heat for 1 minute.
4. Add the chicken breasts to the skillet and cook about 3 minutes on each side. Do not overcook.
5. Transfer the cooked breasts to a heated platter.
6. Add the chicken broth to the skillet and scrape up any browned bits from the bottom.
7. Stir in the lemon juice and capers, then heat through.
8. Pour the sauce over the breasts.
Yield: 4 servings
